# Nexa.luxury - LLM Guide

## Overview
Educational resource for understanding Nexa cryptocurrency, focusing on its supply mechanics, technical advantages over Bitcoin, and scaling capabilities.

## Key Information
- **Total Supply**: 21 Trillion NEX.
- **Divisibility**: 1 NEX = 100 smallest units (Satoshis).
- **Comparison to Bitcoin**: 
    - Same total number of smallest units (2.1 Quadrillion).
    - Nexa is much faster (10k+ TPS) vs Bitcoin (~7 TPS).
    - Lower fees and natively scalable.
- **Halving**: 
    - Nexa halves every 2 years.
    - Year 7-8 reward: 1.25M NEX.
    - Designed to reach scarcity faster than Bitcoin's 4-year cycle.

## Core Philosophical Pillar
"Nexa has the same scarcity as Bitcoin! The 21 trillion number just means you work with whole numbers instead of tiny decimal fractions."

## Site Structure
- `/`: Main landing page with all key information components.
- `/docs`: Detailed project documentation (Architecture, Requirements).

## Contact & Links
- Twitter: [twitter.com/nexa_luxury]
- GitHub: [github.com/nexa-luxury]
